headline: Epirus, General Dynamics Land Systems and Kodiak AI Unveil New Autonomous HPM System for Counter-UAS
summary: Leonidas Autonomous Ground Vehicle (AGV) combines Epirus’ Leonidas high-power microwave platform, the Kodiak Driver autonomous system and General Dynamics Land Systems’ system integration expertise to deliver a mobile, autonomous counter-UAS capabilityLOS ANGELES, March 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Epirus, General Dynamics Land Systems (GDLS) and Kodiak AI (Kodiak) today unveiled Leonidas Autonomous Ground Vehicle (AGV), a mobile, fully autonomous vehicle for counter-UAS, critical point defense

content.title: Epirus, General Dynamics Land Systems and Kodiak AI Unveil New Autonomous HPM System for Counter-UAS
